title: Terrornet
overview: A Ghosthunting team, consisting of psychic medium Glenn Staker, presenter Louise Jameson and tech expert David Edison, attempt to help cursed woman, Sarah, by banishing the spirit that haunts her. The project has been secretly funded by mysterious entrepreneur Mr. Namtar-Netty. But David has given all the money to a camgirl he is obsessed with, after she told him she was going to be homeless. At their first online Ghosthunting event, Glenn tries to banish the demon haunting Sarah - Asmodeus, the demon of lust.
